title: Sponsorship agreement holders: Sponsor a pre-approved refugee in need - Canada.ca
content:
## Sponsor a pre-approved refugee in need
You can sponsor pre-approved refugees through the Blended Visa Office-Referred (BVOR) Program. These refugees:
- have the greatest need to resettle
- are already eligible to come to Canada
- can have their applications processed quicker

## Your responsibilities as a BVOR sponsor
You need to commit to providing:
- 6 months of financial support
- 12 months of social, emotional and settlement support
The Government of Canada provides the other 6 months of financial support.
- Find a BVOR refugee to sponsor Find a refugee to match with on the RSTP
          site Create an account and request a refugee match Confirm your match once it’s been approved

## Find a BVOR refugee to sponsor
- Find a refugee to match with on the RSTP
          site
- Create an account and request a refugee match
- Confirm your match once it’s been approved
- Apply to sponsor a refugee you’ve been matched with After you confirm your match in your RSTP account, we’ll email you more information about your sponsorship case.
      You’ll need it to complete a few forms: Sponsorship Undertaking – Sponsorship Agreement Holders (SAH) (IMM 5373) (opens in a new
          tab) Settlement Plan — Sponsorship Agreement Holders (SAH) (IMM 5440) (opens in a new
          tab) Sponsor Assessment (IMM 5492) (opens in a new tab) The RSTP will tell you how to properly submit your application. If you need help, you can contact them at bvor@rstp.ca .

## Apply to sponsor a refugee you’ve been matched with
After you confirm your match in your RSTP account, we’ll email you more information about your sponsorship case.
      You’ll need it to complete a few forms:
- Sponsorship Undertaking – Sponsorship Agreement Holders (SAH) (IMM 5373) (opens in a new
          tab)
- Settlement Plan — Sponsorship Agreement Holders (SAH) (IMM 5440) (opens in a new
          tab)
- Sponsor Assessment (IMM 5492) (opens in a new tab)
The RSTP will tell you how to properly submit your application. If you need help, you can contact them at bvor@rstp.ca .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
